row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a wet urban road, approaching an intersection with traffic lights.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red boxes indicate static or slow-moving obstacles (construction barriers, parked cars) on the left and center; blue lines suggest lane boundaries; green line indicates forward path.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene under overcast, rainy conditions. Wet pavement reflects surroundings. Road has multiple lanes, crosswalks, and construction zones marked by orange cones and barriers.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements are clearly visible despite rain. No major occlusions or distortions. Scene is coherent and physically plausible.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward motion consistent with vehicle driving at moderate speed. Objects maintain relative positions without sudden jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles, barriers, and infrastructure remain continuously present across frames. No ghosting or duplication observed.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and overhead structures remain stable and aligned with perspective changes.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily toward intersection. No abrupt braking or steering evident.
decision.risk_context: Wet road may reduce traction; traffic light ahead is red — potential need to decelerate or stop. Construction zone requires caution but no immediate hazard detected.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street scene with wet pavement and overcast sky. Buildings, roads, and traffic elements appear structurally similar to Row 1 but exhibit subtle artifacts.
semantic.visibility_notes: Most elements preserved. Some minor blurring around moving objects (e.g., distant vehicles). Traffic light colors slightly less saturated than in Row 1. Cones show slight shape distortion in some frames.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion appears smooth overall. Minor flickering in reflections on wet road surface. No major object disappearance or teleportation.
logical.object_continuity: Objects generally persist across frames. Slight warping of barrier shapes near edges of frame. Distant car silhouettes occasionally merge or blur unnaturally.
logical.structure_continuity: Building lines and road edges remain mostly consistent. Overhead gantry structure shows minor bending/stretching in later frames compared to Row 1.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily, matching Row 1 trajectory. No deviation or erratic behavior observed.
decision.risk_context: Same risk context as Row 1: wet road, red light ahead, construction zone. Generated video does not introduce new hazards but may reduce clarity of fine details due to artifacting.

missing_or_weakened_elements: slight reduction in saturation of traffic lights
minor loss of sharpness in distant vehicle outlines
artifacts_or_instabilities: slight warping of construction barriers near frame edges
occasional merging of distant vehicle silhouettes
minor stretching of overhead gantry structure in later frames
